comment: Splynek Sovereignty catalog. Edit this file, then run 'swift Scripts/regenerate-sovereignty-catalog.swift' to refresh SovereigntyCatalog+Entries.swift. See SOVEREIGNTY-CONTRIBUTING.md.

alternatives.name: Firefox
alternatives.note: Mozilla Foundation (MPL). Gecko engine, strong privacy defaults.

alternatives.name: Element
alternatives.note: UK-based. Matrix protocol, fully open-source, self-hostable.

alternatives.name: Threema
alternatives.note: Threema GmbH (Switzerland). Paid, no phone-number required.

alternatives.name: LibreOffice
alternatives.note: The Document Foundation (Germany). MPL. Drop-in replacement.

alternatives.name: Obsidian
alternatives.note: Local-first markdown, free for personal use.

alternatives.name: DaVinci Resolve
alternatives.note: Blackmagic Design (Australia). Free tier exceptionally powerful.

alternatives.name: Kdenlive
alternatives.note: GPL. KDE project, non-linear video editor.

alternatives.name: VSCodium
alternatives.note: MIT. Telemetry-free build of VS Code.

alternatives.name: OrbStack
alternatives.note: Free tier + paid. Native Mac container runtime.

alternatives.name: Nextcloud
alternatives.note: Nextcloud GmbH (Germany). AGPL. Self-hosted or EU providers.

alternatives.name: Bitwarden
alternatives.note: AGPL. Free tier generous, self-hostable via Vaultwarden.

alternatives.name: LM Studio
alternatives.note: Run open-weight models (Llama, Mistral, Qwen) fully local.

alternatives.name: Ollama
alternatives.note: MIT. CLI + API for local model inference.

alternatives.name: Zed
alternatives.note: GPL. Native editor with AI integration.

alternatives.name: Jellyfin
alternatives.note: GPL. Fork of Emby with a fully-open stack.

alternatives.name: Nextcloud
alternatives.note: Nextcloud GmbH (Germany). AGPL. Self-hosted or EU providers.

alternatives.name: Syncthing
alternatives.note: MPL. Continuous P2P folder sync, fully local.

alternatives.name: Arq Backup
alternatives.note: US-based client, but backs up to any endpoint you choose (including EU buckets / your own NAS).

alternatives.name: BorgBackup
alternatives.note: BSD. Deduplicating encrypted backups, bring-your-own storage.

alternatives.name: Signal
alternatives.note: Signal Foundation. E2E by default, no metadata-at-rest.

alternatives.name: UTM
alternatives.note: Apache. QEMU-based VM, native Apple Silicon.

alternatives.name: Transmission
alternatives.note: MIT. Native Mac BitTorrent, no ads.

alternatives.name: Zotero
alternatives.note: AGPL. Free reference manager, Mozilla Foundation-adjacent.

alternatives.name: Bluesky
alternatives.note: US-based but AGPL+protocol — a looser federation option. Note: US-hosted.

alternatives.name: Bluesky
alternatives.note: US-based but AGPL+protocol — a looser federation option. Note: US-hosted.
